confirmedOpen: Freddo — Kamp 16, 3811 AR Amersfoort. Coffee / matcha / ice cream / fresh sandwiches café opened by Andra Mirzoyan in November 2025. Confirmed live: own ordering site (freddo.sitedish.shop) lists Kamp 16 and hours 10:00–16:00 daily; Tijd voor Amersfoort listing active; indebuurt/Drimble article 27 Nov 2025 announces the opening. This is the business CURRENTLY operating at Kamp 16 (it replaced Ritos).

FLUPS (Fashion Lending & Upcycle Store) — Kamp 4, 3811 AR Amersfoort. Sustainable second-hand / upcycle fashion store (buy or rent luxury second-hand clothing, jewellery, bags, items from Amersfoort waste streams). Owner Marina; formerly trading as 'The Community of Closets'. Open Wed–Sat 10:00–18:00. Active site flupsonline.nl + Tijd voor Amersfoort listing.

likelyClosedOrMoved.name: BKK Thai Fun Dining — Kamp 10 (D'Gekroonde Bye-Korf)
likelyClosedOrMoved.reason: CLOSED. The municipality revoked the operating permit; the restaurant was shut in early March 2024 after owner Rolls Ratelband's repeated misconduct (public drunkenness Jan 2023, banging on neighbours' doors/windows March 2023, suspected drink-driving April 2023). Mayor declared him 'of bad character' on 7 Oct 2023; his appeal was rejected by the court in April 2024 (destadamersfoort.nl / nieuwsplein33 / RTV Utrecht, 25 Jul 2024). The monumental 1667 building (214 m², 65 seats + 16 terrace, rent €33k/yr) is now listed FOR SALE on Horecaspot.nl at €149,000 as an 'exclusieve overnamekans: high-end restaurant in monumentaal pand', confirming the pand is vacant. The 'we hope to announce a reopening date soon' popup still on bkkthaifundining.nl is stale/aspirational; no reopening has occurred.

likelyClosedOrMoved.name: Ritos Amersfoort (Fresh Mex & Pokébowls) — Kamp 16
likelyClosedOrMoved.reason: CLOSED / GONE FROM KAMP 16. Operator Ritos Utrecht B.V. was declared bankrupt by the Midden-Nederland court on 2 July 2025 (faillissement F.16/25/332, curator mr. D. de Goede). Ritos Amersfoort B.V. shows an insolvency-administrator 'Initiation' entry dated 10 Dec 2025 on Northdata (KVK 82251401). The Kamp 16 unit is now occupied by Freddo (opened Nov 2025, run by Andra Mirzoyan — same family as Ritos operator Serop Mirzoyan), so Ritos is no longer the operating business at this address. The Ritos chain site root (ritos-fresh-mex-en-pokebowls.nl) is now a placeholder and its /contact page 404s; ritosnederland.nl/amersfoort returns a server error. Old directory listings still echo the Kamp 16 address but are out of date.

https://horecaspot.nl/aanbod/bedrijf-3938-exclusieve-overnamekans-high-end-restaurant-in-monumentaal-pand (Kamp 10 monumental pand FOR SALE €149,000 — confirms vacant)
https://www.northdata.com/Ritos%20Amersfoort%20B%C2%B7V%C2%B7,%20Amersfoort/KVK%2082251401 (Ritos Amersfoort B.V. — insolvency administrator initiation 10 Dec 2025; registered Kamp 16)
https://drimble.nl/regio/utrecht/amersfoort/104787730/koffie-matcha-en-sandwiches-andra-opent-freddo-op-de-kamp.html (Freddo opening by Andra Mirzoyan at Kamp 16, published 27 Nov 2025)
https://freddo.sitedish.shop/ (Freddo live ordering site — Kamp 16, daily 10:00–16:00)
notes:
CLEAR RESOLUTION OF BOTH QUESTIONS:

1) Kamp 16 — Freddo is the business CURRENTLY operating, NOT Ritos. Ritos and Freddo are run by the same family (Mirzoyan). Ritos's operating company Ritos Utrecht B.V. went bankrupt on 2 July 2025; Ritos Amersfoort B.V. shows insolvency proceedings initiated 10 Dec 2025. Andra Mirzoyan opened Freddo (coffee/matcha/sandwiches) at the very same Kamp 16 unit in November 2025. So Ritos at Kamp 16 = closed/replaced; Freddo = open. Treat any data source still showing 'Ritos, Kamp 16' as stale.

2) Kamp 10 / BKK Thai Fun Dining (D'Gekroonde Bye-Korf) — CLOSED since early March 2024, permit revoked by the municipality after owner Rolls Ratelband's misconduct (appeal rejected April 2024). The historic 1667 pand is now actively listed FOR SALE on Horecaspot at €149,000 (214 m², 65+16 seats), confirming it is vacant. The 'reopening soon' popup on the old BKK site is aspirational and out of date — no reopening has happened. Note: Rolls Ratelband (Amersfoort restaurateur) is unrelated to TV personality Emile Ratelband.

NEW OPENINGS / CHANGES on/near the Kamp in the last ~2 years: Freddo (Kamp 16, Nov 2025); FLUPS / Fashion Lending & Upcycle Store (Kamp 4, sustainable fashion, rebrand of 'The Community of Closets', owner Marina). A 'Café STU' was also referenced but it is in the Mondriaankwartier, not on the Kamp itself, so I left it out of confirmed Kamp openings. I could not find any new opening or closure specifically on Grote Sint Jansstraat in this window (only a commercial-space listing at Grote Sint Jansstraat 7, no named new tenant). Searches were US-routed (WebSearch) so a couple of Dutch sources (indebuurt.nl, eet.nu) blocked direct fetch (403/blocked) — findings above rely on the accessible sources cited.

likelyClosedOrMoved.name: Louis Blancardi Wijnen — Zuidsingel 62 (old address)
likelyClosedOrMoved.reason: Likely MOVED. Old directories (uniekwinkelen) list Wijnhandel Louis Blancardi at Zuidsingel 62, but you already have it at Kamp 42. Treat the Zuidsingel 62 listing as stale; your Kamp 42 entry is the current one.

likelyClosedOrMoved.name: Kamperbinnenpoort 3 (retail unit)
likelyClosedOrMoved.reason: VACANT / for rent. Funda in Business and bedrijfspand.com list the 69 m² corner retail space as available to let — no operating business there currently, so nothing to add.

notes:
Researched the four target areas. Found 11 businesses in scope not on your list: 5 on Grote Sint Jansstraat (PIEN antiek nr 1, De Haarschneider nr 2, Il diVino nr 2a, René Benoît nr 1-E, Orium Goudsmeden nr 5), 5 on the Kamp end of Zuidsingel 60-68 (Bakkerij Boersma 60, Alivio 63, Downey's 65, Singelhuis 67, Hairstyling Geke 68), and Heart & Arrow Trouwringen on the Kamperbinnenpoort corner (nr 8). Categories are my best mapping to your existing scheme; adjust as you see fit (e.g. Singelhuis could be Eten & drinken or a venue, Alivio is supplies+salon).

De Eetstee (Zuidsingel 66) is closed — its spot is your La Base Pizza, so that swap is already reflected. Louis Blancardi Wijnen shows at Zuidsingel 62 in old data but you have it at Kamp 42 (moved); ignore the Zuidsingel listing. Kamperbinnenpoort 3 is an empty retail unit for rent.

Caveats: Weverssingel near nr 2 — beyond Bij Sophie (already listed) at nr 2 and Heart & Arrow which some directories tag at Weverssingel 10 (but its real storefront is Kamperbinnenpoort 8), I found mostly commercial-property listings (e.g. Weverssingel 10, a large former Expert unit) rather than active small shops, so nothing extra to add there. uniekwinkelen.nl is a useful but partly outdated directory (expired SSL cert); I cross-checked every candidate against a fresher source (tijdvooramersfoort, VVV, Yelp 2025-2026, or the business's own site) before including it. Phone numbers in notes are from directory data and not independently re-verified for 2026.

notes: House numbers on Kamp run odd on one side and even on the other; many buildings are split into units (e.g., 8/8A, 34/34A, 36/36A), which explains several apparent address conflicts. Key data sources: (1) utrecht-nieuws.nl/straten/kamp — a full KvK-style street registry that gave per-house-number listings (most complete single source, but can lag a year or two and still showed stale entries like 'burgerme', 'Kaldi', 'Arthur & Willemijn'); (2) openingstijdengids.nl; (3) vvvamersfoort.nl and tijdvooramersfoort.nl gebied pages; (4) each business's own site / Fresha / Thuisbezorgd. CONFLICTS TO VERIFY ON-SITE: Kamp 8 (De Tafelaar vs Double F Cosmetica); Kamp 19 (Saya Boutique Hotel + ReYoutiefull Store + stale 'Arthur & Willemijn'); Kamp 16 (Freddo + Ritos + Studio Mr Bunny's own site oddly lists Kamp 16, though it's at Kamp 62); Kamp 50 vs 52 for Leith Jewels; Kamp 63 (Snufl vs Belhadi Modestoffen); Kamp 70 ('Galakledingwinkel'/Perfect Dress/De Galazaak). EXCLUDED as NOT on Kamp: Fashion Livy (Kamperbinnenpoort 3), The Wax Bar (Grote Sint Jansstraat 13), Run2Day (Grote Haag 129). LIKELY CLOSED (stale registry entries): 'burgerme' Kamp 72 (eet.nu marks it Closed); 'Kaldi' Kamp 10 (now BKK Thai Fun Dining); 'Big Bazar' Kamp 17 (chain went bankrupt nationally 2023 — verify). 'Krijco' at Kamp 33 = the operating company of Jack's Casino (same venue, already in your list). The grachten-side businesses already in your list (Grote Sint Jansstraat, Zuidsingel, Weverssingel) were not re-investigated as they fall outside the Kamp/Achter de Kamp scope.
